title: UTCIHeatPlotCommand
description: UTCIHeatPlotCommand: Command that, when executed with the LadybugToolsAdapter, simulates UTCI values and outputs a heatmap. Output is a BH.oM.LadybugTools.PlotInformation containing the plot and extra information about the collection, and the ExternalComfort object that was used to get the UTCI values (whether the simulation ran or not).

EPWFile.description: The path to an EPW file. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

ExternalComfort.description: The external comfort object containing the UTCI data to plot. If the UTCI collection is null or empty, then a simulation will be run before plotting to get these values.

BinColours.description: A list of 10 colours to use for each UTCI category, leave empty to use the default UTCI colours.

OutputLocation.description: Full file path (with file name) to save the plot to. Leave blank to output a base 64 string representation of the image instead.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
